title: Risky commando plan to seize Iran’s uranium came at Trump’s request
summary_full: A plan briefed to Trump last week to insert ground forces to remove Iran’s nuclear material would be a very difficult endeavor of a type never before attempted in wartime.
summary_public: A plan briefed to Trump last week to insert ground forces to remove Iran’s nuclear material would be a very difficult endeavor of a type never before attempted in wartime.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Risky commando plan to seize Iran’s uranium came at Trump’s request
